---
title: "The First International Conference on Lectometry"
subtitle: "26--28 July 2027, Otaru, Japan"
site: distill::distill_website
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(knitr)
library(readxl)
library(tidyverse)
library(leaflet)
library(DT)
library(hms)

opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)

```

# About

The **First International Conference on Lectometry** (LectoConf1) is a conference dedicated to the art of measuring distance (the quantifiable degree of dissimilarity) between lects (linguistic varieties). It will be held in hybrid mode in **Otaru, Japan** on **26--28 July 2027**.

# Plenary speakers

 * [**Szeto** Pui Yiu](https://pyszeto.wixsite.com/home) (University of Hong Kong)
 * [Hedvig **Skirgård**](https://sites.google.com/site/hedvigskirgard) (Max Planck Institute for Evolutionary Anthropology)

# Call for papers
